summary: Comprehensive testing completed for OEC Tech Institute e-learning platform iteration 3. All features from the requirements tested successfully including: homepage with hero section, 3D image, animated counters, featured courses, benefits grid, diploma tracks preview, reviews preview, CTA section, FAQ accordion; sticky header with scroll-aware show/hide; all navigation links; courses page with search and category filters; course detail page with weekly outline, requirements, what you'll learn sections; reviews page with 104 reviews, Swiper carousel, country filters; preloader; ScrollToTop button; footer with correct brand name; btn-gold and btn-gold-outline CSS classes properly styled; lazy loading on images.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, 3D image, animated counters (2500+ Students, 7 Courses, 3 Diplomas, 95% Success Rate)
Hero section has floating badges (Earning Potential $500-$2000/mo, Students from 4 Countries)
Featured courses section displays 6 courses with proper styling
Benefits grid section present with 5 benefit cards
Diploma tracks preview section shows 3 diploma tracks
Reviews preview section shows 4 reviews
CTA section with 'Limited Seats Available' badge
FAQ accordion with 4 questions, toggle functionality works
Sticky header shows/hides on scroll direction (visible when scrolling up, hidden when scrolling down fast)
All navigation links work (Home, Courses, Diplomas, Reviews, About, Contact, FAQ)
Courses page loads with search input and 6 category filters (All, Technology, Design, Marketing, E-Commerce, Web Development)
7 course cards displayed with lazy loading images
Course detail page loads with weekly outline (expandable weeks with lessons)
Course detail page shows Requirements and What You Will Learn sections
Reviews page loads with 104 reviews
Swiper carousel present for Featured Reviews with autoplay
Country filters work (All: 104, Pakistan: 80, UAE: 9, UK: 8, USA: 7)
Preloader component present (1.5s display)
ScrollToTop button appears when scrolling down (visible after 400px scroll)
Footer renders with correct brand name 'OEC Tech Institute' and links
Backend API: GET /api/courses returns 7 courses with all required fields
Backend API: GET /api/reviews returns 104 reviews with country codes
Backend API: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns 3 diploma tracks
Backend API: POST /api/contact accepts contact form submissions
Backend API: GET /api/certificates/{enrollment_id} returns 401 when not authenticated (correct behavior)
btn-gold styling: gold background (#D4AF37), black text, rounded (9999px)
btn-gold-outline styling: gold border, gold text, transparent background
Images have loading='lazy' attribute (6 lazy, 1 eager for hero image)
Contact page has form with Name, Email, Subject, Message fields and WhatsApp option
Diploma Tracks page shows roadmap, career outcomes, and included courses with prices
test_credentials: Google OAuth only - no password-based auth
seed_data_creation: 104 reviews seeded with country codes (PK, AE, GB, US)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend has 20 pytest tests covering courses, reviews, diploma-tracks, contact, certificates, and auth endpoints. Frontend tested with Playwright covering homepage sections, navigation, courses page, reviews page with Swiper carousel, course detail page, diploma tracks page, contact page, sticky header behavior, ScrollToTop button, and button styling. MOCKED: Email notifications via Resend (logs to console as RESEND_API_KEY not configured).

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (send_approval_email in server.py) - logs to console instead of sending emails
